checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 069 implements the specified fresh executor source run: dedicated contract, scope, executor handoff, executor packet, runtime launch plan, bounded Claude Code output, runtime result, runtime summary, final report, audit packet, and audit evidence.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: AC-169 through AC-181 are represented by the new documentation, issue 069 contract, scope manifest, handoff input, generated executor packet, launch plan, Claude run evidence, executor output, runtime result, runtime summary, final report, audit packet, ChatGPT/Codex audit, and validation evidence.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The task stayed inside the issue 069 scope. Claude Code wrote only the two executor exclusive write paths, and coordinator-owned artifacts stayed in declared paths. No secrets, production configuration, billing, auth, database, dependency installation, CI/CD security weakening, or deployment changes were involved.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The executor invocation used Read and Write tools only, recorded a bounded exit code 0 run, and the runtime result and summary preserve false execution policy booleans for launch-side side effects, secrets, production, dependency installation, and deployment.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files are declared in the final report and covered by the issue 069 scope manifest. Issue 067 scope cleanup is explicitly included to close stale active scope state. Local untracked .agents and .claude/settings.local.json remain outside the staged task scope.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Executor packet validation, runtime launch validation, runtime result validation, runtime summary validation, contract validation, scope validation, standard validation, smoke validation, final report validation, audit packet validation, ChatGPT audit validation, security gate validation, review gate validation, and git diff whitespace validation are recorded as passed.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Local CI-equivalent validation passed. GitHub PR CI remains a required external merge gate and must pass before automatic merge.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records the bounded Claude executor run, changed files, local validation evidence, pending GitHub PR CI, no deployment, and future multi-executor runtime work.

findings.evidence: The runtime summary links the issue 069 launch plan and runtime result, records four passed runtime validations, and marks merge readiness as ready_for_policy_gates with no blockers.
findings.recommendation: Use the next dedicated contract to repeat the same evidence chain across multiple non-overlapping executor scopes.

unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending until the branch is pushed and checks run.
Multi-executor fresh runtime evidence remains future work.
